title: papaver alpinum var. suaveolens
intro: Papaver alpinum var. suaveolens, also known as the Himalayan poppy, is a variety of the alpine poppy plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of alkaloids. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum var. suaveolens include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
